text:
Created attachment 248741
git --diff against dns/knot-resolver

Security update for knot-resolver (CVE-2023-50868)

https://gitlab.nic.cz/knot/knot-resolver/-/releases/v5.7.1

I am not the maintainer, and I am not using this port, yet. 
It compiles with poudriere.

HTH
